title: TreeCutterPro
description: High-performance, metadata-aware forestry for modern Minecraft servers
body:
# 🪓 TreeCutterPro
> **High-performance, metadata-aware forestry for modern Minecraft servers.**

TreeCutterPro is a premium-grade utility designed for the "Pro Series" collection. It provides a lightning-fast, satisfying woodcutting experience while ensuring server performance and environmental sustainability.

### ✨ Key Features
* 🌲 **Aggressive Felling:** Uses an optimized BFS algorithm to fell entire trees instantly.
* 🍂 **Instant Leaf Decay:** Leaves explode into items (apples, sticks, saplings) the moment the trunk falls.
* 🌿 **Universal Reforestation:** Automatically replants the correct sapling (supports Oak, Cherry, Mangrove, and more).
* 🏠 **House Protection:** Built-in metadata engine ensures player-placed logs (houses, bridges) are NEVER accidentally broken.
* 🛡️ **Durability Guard:** Automatically stops when your tool is at 1 HP to prevent accidental breakage.
* ⏳ **Configurable Cooldown:** Balance your economy with action-bar cooldown timers (or set to 0 to disable).

### 🔑 Permissions & Commands
| Permission | Description | Command |
| :--- | :--- | :--- |
| `treecutter.use` | Required to use the felling logic | n/a |
| `treecutter.toggle` | Access to enable/disable the plugin | `/tc` |
| `treecutter.reload` | Admin permission to reload config | `/tc reload` |

---
